security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: https: http://asset.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* http://[::1]:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Verified Windows app store and installer for OpenInstall packages
bundle.longDescription: OpenInstall is a Windows package manager, app store, and installer that imports app repos and installs openinstall:// apps only after verifying publisher signatures, file hashes, Authenticode status, and explicit user consent.
